name: Transformer architecture
notes: Self-attention + feed-forward stack. Foundation of modern LLMs.

name: Self-attention
notes: Q/K/V dot-product mechanism. Core of transformer.

name: Tokenization (BPE / SentencePiece)
notes: How text becomes tokens. Affects context window economics and multilingual perf.

name: Positional encodings (RoPE, ALiBi)
notes: How transformers represent token order. RoPE dominates long-context.

name: Pre-training vs fine-tuning
notes: Stages of LLM training. Pre-training learns the world; fine-tuning specializes.

name: RLHF and RLAIF
notes: Reinforcement learning from human/AI feedback. Aligns model output with preferences.

name: Constitutional AI
notes: Anthropic's alignment approach using a written constitution + AI critique.

name: Mixture of Experts (MoE)
notes: Sparse activation across many sub-networks. GPT-4, Mixtral, DeepSeek-V3.

name: Chain-of-thought prompting
notes: Explicit reasoning steps in output. Foundation of inference-time compute.

name: Inference-time compute / extended thinking
notes: Spending tokens on thinking before answering. o1, Claude extended thinking.

name: Tool use / function calling
notes: LLM emits structured tool calls; harness executes; results loop back.

name: Retrieval-augmented generation (RAG)
notes: Retrieve relevant docs, condition generation on them. Reduces hallucination on factual tasks.

name: Embeddings
notes: Dense vector representations. Foundation of retrieval, clustering, semantic search.

name: Scaling laws
notes: Loss as power-law in compute/data/params. Chinchilla refined the data ratio.

name: Mechanistic interpretability
notes: Reverse-engineering circuits inside trained models. Sparse autoencoders, induction heads.

name: Agentic systems / multi-step agents
notes: Models that plan, use tools, and self-correct over many steps. Claude Code, Devin.

name: Prompt caching
notes: Reusing computed KV state across requests. ~10x cost/latency reduction on stable prefixes.

name: Speculative decoding
notes: Draft model proposes tokens, target verifies in parallel. Faster inference.

name: Long-context techniques
notes: Ring attention, flash attention, sparse attention. Pushing context windows past 1M.

name: Evaluation / benchmarks
notes: MMLU, HumanEval, SWE-bench, MMLU-Pro. Saturation, contamination, harness effects.
